segments.text: Indian V schools are hitting placement home runs. V schools like I am Blackie,
ISB Hyderabad and Mohalli and XL Laura Jamshedpur are reporting 100% placement for this year. The biggest recruiters
are consulting and IT firms. McKenzie is a major name across campuses. Accenture has strong hiring presence at IM Kolkata
and Bangalore. Global high-profile firms are joining the mix too reflecting growing international exposure of Indian talent. Salaries are no joke either. At
IM Bangalore, all students landed roles across sectors like finance, product management, analytics and consulting. At IIM Ahmedabad, leading recruiters like
BCG, Goldman Sachs and others made a serious play for students. This is proof that top tier B schools in India are not just producing talent. They are producing industry ready leaders.
Corporates are betting heavily on Indian MBA graduates even in uncertain global times. If you are planning your MBA journey, this placement data is a
signal. Indian B schools are deeply trusted and top companies are aggressively recruiting from them.
